description_long: This is a two-story brick apartment building with a symmetrical facade and a gabled, tiled roof. The front features large rectangular windows arranged in pairs, and two main entrances, each leading to a separate unit, are visible at the rear. The building has two carports on either side, each covered by a flat roof and supported by brick columns. The exterior walls are constructed from reddish-brown brick, and the roof is covered with gray tiles. The structure sits on a rectangular plot with a grass border and paved walkways leading to the entrances and carports. The overall design is simple and functional, with a focus on practicality and suburban residential aesthetics.
description: A two-story brick apartment building with a gabled tiled roof, symmetrical windows, and dual carports on either side. The structure features large windows, two main entrances at the rear, and sits on a grassy plot with paved walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facade, large paired windows, and both carports flanking the building.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat-roofed carport, brick wall, and the sloped roof extending over the structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two main entrances, additional windows, and paved walkways leading to the doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other carport and the continuous brick wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in pairs on both floors, evenly spaced across the facade and rear, providing a balanced and orderly appearance.
